title: vatica venulosa
intro: Vatica venulosa, also known as the 'Mountain Mahogany', is a species of plant in the family Dipterocarpaceae, native to Southeast Asia. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties, derived from its bark and leaves. The health benefits of Vatica venulosa include its ability to reduce fever, treat respiratory issues, and alleviate pain. The plant is often prepared as a decoction or infusion for medicinal purposes, and its bark is also used to make a traditional herbal tea.
